command:
delete from battle_heartbeats
where
  last_heartbeat < now() - interval '15 seconds';

update matches m
set
  status = 'abandoned',
  winner = case
    when exists (
      select
        1
      from
        battle_heartbeats h
      where
        h.uid = m.player1_uid
        and h.last_heartbeat >= now() - interval '15 seconds'
    ) then m.player1_uid
    else m.player2_uid
  end
where
  m.status = 'in_progress'
  and (
    not exists (
      select
        1
      from
        battle_heartbeats h
      where
        h.uid = m.player1_uid
        and h.last_heartbeat >= now() - interval '15 seconds'
    )
    or not exists (
      select
        1
      from
        battle_heartbeats h
      where
        h.uid = m.player2_uid
        and h.last_heartbeat >= now() - interval '15 seconds'
    )
  );

delete from matchmaking_heartbeats
where
  last_heartbeat < now() - interval '15 seconds';

delete from matchmaking_queue
where
  uid in (
    select
      q.uid
    from
      matchmaking_queue q
      left join matchmaking_heartbeats h on h.uid = q.uid
    where
      h.uid is null
      or h.last_heartbeat < now() - interval '15 seconds'
  )
  and status = 'waiting';

update public.matches
set
  game_state = '{}'
where
  status in ('finished', 'abandoned')
  and created_at < now() - interval '7 days';
